user_prompt: VIP customer is unhappy and said 'this is unacceptable.' Flag and draft an empathetic follow-up.
actual_output:
Priority: CRITICAL
Category: Technical/General - VIP Escalation
Flag: VIP Customer - Immediate Attention Required

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

I am truly sorry to hear that your experience has been unacceptable. I completely understand your frustration, and I want to make this right for you immediately.

I have personally flagged your account for priority review so that our senior support team can investigate exactly what went wrong. I am looking into your recent interactions now to get up to speed.

Could you please let me know the specific issue you are encountering? Once I have those details, I will ensure this is escalated to the appropriate technical lead to get a resolution for you as quickly as possible.

I am here to help and will stay with you until this is resolved.

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a customer support ticket triage and response drafting exercise, which is explicitly within its defined responsibilities.
